scripts.dev:stack: cd local && docker compose build web-app control-plane metrics vpn-node && docker compose up -d postgres control-plane metrics web-app vpn-node && (docker compose watch || echo "[dev:stack] docker compose watch failed (likely another watch is running); containers are up with latest images.")
scripts.dev:stripe: sh -c 'if command -v stripe >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Starting Stripe listener (loading .env)..."; set -a; [ -f .env ] && . .env; set +a; if [ -n "$STRIPE_SECRET_KEY" ]; then echo "Using STRIPE_SECRET_KEY from .env for Stripe CLI"; stripe listen --api-key "$STRIPE_SECRET_KEY" --forward-to http://localhost:3000/api/webhooks/stripe; else echo "[dev] STRIPE_SECRET_KEY not set in .env; starting stripe listen without explicit --api-key"; stripe listen --forward-to http://localhost:3000/api/webhooks/stripe; fi; else echo "[dev] Stripe CLI not installed; skipping stripe listen"; fi'
scripts.dev:studio: sh -c 'echo "Waiting for postgres on localhost:5432..."; until nc -z localhost 5432 2>/dev/null; do sleep 2; done; echo "postgres is up; starting Prisma Studio..."; cd packages/db && DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/vpnvpn bunx prisma studio'
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "stack,desktop,stripe,studio" --prefix-colors "blue,magenta,cyan,yellow" "bun run dev:stack" "bun run dev:desktop" "bun run dev:stripe" "bun run dev:studio"
scripts.dev:web: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "stack,stripe,studio" --prefix-colors "blue,cyan,yellow" "bun run dev:stack" "bun run dev:stripe" "bun run dev:studio"
